text: Employees may park in lot B after 6pm on weekdays. Lot A is reserved for visitors during business hours and requires a pass from reception.
To power up a device that won't turn on, hold the power button for ten seconds, then connect the charger and wait two minutes before trying again.
Annual leave must be requested at least two weeks in advance through the HR portal. Unused leave does not roll over past the end of the calendar year.
Our refund policy allows a full refund within 30 days of purchase, provided the item is unused and in its original packaging. After 30 days, only store credit is offered.
To cancel your subscription, open Account Settings and choose End Plan. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period; no partial refunds are given for the remaining days.
Premium plan members get priority support, with a guaranteed first response within four business hours. Standard members receive a response within two business days.
Reset your password from the login screen by clicking 'Forgot password'. A reset link is emailed to your registered address and expires after one hour for security.
The error code 0x80070005 means 'access denied'. Run the application as administrator, or ask IT to grant your account write permission to the target folder.
Company laptops back up automatically to the cloud every night at 2am while connected to the office network. Files in the Desktop and Documents folders are included; external drives are not.
The office kitchen is restocked every Monday and Thursday. Please label personal items in the fridge; unlabelled food is cleared out each Friday evening.
